title: Контракт yield: return, break, где нельзя

cards.prompt: yield break explicitly ends iteration at the first non-positive element, so the tail after -1 is not yielded.
cards.code: using System; using System.Collections.Generic; IEnumerable<int> TakeWhilePositive(IEnumerable<int> nums){ foreach(int n in nums){ if(n>0) yield return n; else yield break; } } Console.WriteLine(string.Join(" ", TakeWhilePositive(new int[]{2,3,4,5,-1,3,4})));

cards.prompt: IEnumerator<T> is a valid iterator return type, iterated by hand via MoveNext/Current.
cards.code: using System; using System.Collections.Generic; using System.Text; IEnumerator<int> Ector(){ yield return 7; yield return 8; } var e = Ector(); var sb = new StringBuilder(); while(e.MoveNext()) sb.Append(e.Current).Append(" "); Console.WriteLine($"IEnumerator<int> as return: {sb.ToString().Trim()}");

cards.prompt: using inside an iterator compiles to try/finally, so Dispose runs even on an early break.
cards.code: using System; using System.Collections.Generic; class Res : IDisposable { public void Dispose()=>Console.WriteLine("disposed"); } IEnumerable<int> Read(){ using var r = new Res(); yield return 1; yield return 2; yield return 3; } foreach(var x in Read()){ Console.WriteLine($"got {x}"); if(x==1) break; }
